file_insights.purpose: Public menu display template for QR code access
key_features: Product cards with images and pricing

patterns_discovered.description: CSS variables injected from menu.theme.get_css_variables_string() for dynamic theming
Product images with lazy loading and icon fallback when image missing
patterns_discovered.implementation: conditional image or placeholder icon with ph-bowl-food

patterns_discovered.description: Flex-based responsive product cards with different sizes for mobile/desktop
Alpine.js x-data used for showQuickAdd state management
patterns_discovered.purpose: Quick visual feedback on add-to-cart action

patterns_discovered.description: Dynamic icon rendering based on tag type (vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, halal)
Support for category hierarchy with visual indentation and border styling
Comprehensive dark: prefixes throughout for Tailwind dark mode
URL generation using url template tag with org_slug, menu_slug, product_slug

gotchas_discovered.description: Git diff output was truncated at 42332 characters - menu_detail.html content not visible
Product card HTML structure repeated in main categories and subcategories with comment 'could be extracted to a partial'
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Extract to Django template include partial

gotchas_discovered.description: Line 171 uses |stringformat:'s'|safe for product ID in JavaScript context
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential XSS if product ID contains malicious content

gotchas_discovered.description: Product ID passed directly to @click handler via x-dispatch
gotchas_discovered.impact: Tight coupling between template and JavaScript event handling

gotchas_discovered.description: is_available status checked multiple times without caching
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential performance issue if property does database query

gotchas_discovered.description: Only first 3 allergens shown with |slice:':3' - no indication if more exist
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users may not see all allergen information

approach_outcome.description: Successfully created comprehensive public menu view template for QR code display
key_accomplishments: Complete responsive menu layout with featured products section
Theme system integration with CSS variables
Product display with rich metadata (spicy level, chef recommendations, availability)
Quick-add to cart functionality with visual feedback
Nested category support with proper visual hierarchy
deliverables: menu_detail.html template (referenced but content not shown)

recommendations.suggestion: Extract duplicate product card component into a reusable partial template
recommendations.example: Create _product_card.html partial with product and menu context parameters

recommendations.suggestion: Review stringformat filter usage - consider using data attributes instead
recommendations.example: Use data-product-id attribute instead of inline JavaScript string

recommendations.suggestion: Ensure product.is_available is prefetched or cached in view
recommendations.benefit: Avoid N+1 queries on availability checks

recommendations.suggestion: Display indicator when allergen list is truncated
recommendations.benefit: Ensure users see complete allergen information
recommendations.example: Add '+X more' badge if allergen count > 3

recommendations.suggestion: Add loading state and error handling for lazy-loaded images
recommendations.implementation: Add LSQIP or skeleton loader while images load

recommendations.suggestion: Document required context variables and menu.settings expectations
recommendations.benefit: Clarity for developers using this template

recommendations.suggestion: Consider pagination for very long product lists
recommendations.implementation: AJAX infinite scroll or pagination controls
